auth.initialMessage: Sign in to open the operator console.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email and confirm the address before logging in.
auth.emailVerified: Email verified. You can now log in.
auth.emailVerificationFailed: Email verification failed or the link has expired.

landing.headline: Train, monitor, and deploy autonomous driving policies for a model urban vehicle.
landing.description: From reinforcement learning in simulation to real-time perception and route execution on the physical vehicle.

cards.title: Real-time Perception
cards.text: Live camera stream with pedestrian, lane, obstacle, and road-feature detection used by the driving stack.

cards.title: RL Driving Policy
cards.text: Reinforcement learning policy trained in simulation to support steering, speed control, and local driving decisions.

cards.title: Urban Route Execution
cards.text: Point-to-point navigation through a selected urban map, combining global route goals with local obstacle-aware control.

cards.title: Vehicle Telemetry
cards.text: Runtime monitoring of position, sensor state, control commands, inference status, and system health.

landing.flowTitle: From simulated training to autonomous route execution.

flow.title: Train policy in simulation
flow.text: Use simulated urban scenarios to train and evaluate the RL driving agent.

flow.title: Load map and mission goal
flow.text: Select an urban environment and define the target route from point A to point B.

flow.title: Run perception stack
flow.text: Process camera input to detect pedestrians, lanes, obstacles, and road context.

flow.title: Execute autonomous drive
flow.text: Combine route intent, perception, and RL policy outputs into steering and speed commands.

flow.title: Monitor telemetry and safety
flow.text: Observe vehicle state, detections, control signals, and intervention conditions in real time.

landing.authorDescription: This project was designed and developed by Szymon Tokarz as an engineering platform for experimenting with autonomous vehicle perception, reinforcement learning, simulation-to-real deployment, and real-time vehicle control.
landing.authorNote: The platform connects AI models, simulation environments, perception modules, and vehicle control logic into one experimental autonomy stack.

authorCards.title: AI & Simulation
authorCards.text: Training and evaluating driving policies in simulated urban scenarios.

authorCards.title: Perception Stack
authorCards.text: Detecting pedestrians, lanes, obstacles, and road context from camera input.

authorCards.title: Vehicle Integration
authorCards.text: Connecting perception, control commands, telemetry, and physical model-car deployment.
